name: Kansas Cucumber Salad ("Taste of Home")
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise, sugar, vinegar, dill and salt if desired.
2. Mix well.
3. Add cucumbers and onions; toss.
4. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour.
Yield: 8 servings. Diabetic Exchanges: One 2/3 cup serving (prepared with low fat mayonnaise and without added salt) equals 2 vegetable, 1-1/2 fat; also, 126 calories, 197 mg sodium, 6 mg cholesterol, 14 gm carbohydrate, 1 gm protein, 8 gm fat.
